mapper.sql: id, user_no, mobile, nickname, avatar, gender, level, points, status, token, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO client_users (user_no, mobile, nickname, avatar, gender, level, points, status, token, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nickname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{avatar, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{level, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{points, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{token, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO client_users (user_no, mobile, nickname, avatar, gender, level, points, status, token, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.userNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.nickname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.avatar, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.gender, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.level, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.points, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.token, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM client_users WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
SELECT FROM client_users WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
mapper.update: UPDATE client_users SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE client_users SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
